title: Mezzo Series See-Through Gas Fireplace (AU/NZ) | Heat & Glo
description: Mezzo Series See-Through for AU/NZ: double-sided contemporary linear gas fireplace engineered to AS/NZS 5263. Available through AGA-certified dealers in Australia and New Zealand.

hero.h1: Double-sided linear fire. Two rooms, one regulated unit.
hero.lede: The Mezzo Series See-Through (AU/NZ) extends Heat & Glo's contemporary linear see-through design to the Australian and New Zealand markets, engineered to AS/NZS 5263 and serviced through regional AGA-certified dealers.
